title: Event payload — composition-change
description: Payload schema for event.payload-subtype = 'composition-change' per D10 — workspace composition binding/unbinding (per D7 §4 composition mutability). Refined per D39 (state-is-fully-derived-from-event-chain): for change-type='add', the `record` slot SHOULD carry the full added binding's record so workspace state is reconstructible from the chain alone. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28.

change-type.description: The kind of composition mutation performed.

binding-reference.description: Identifier of the binding affected (e.g., a workspace.composition.adapter-bindings[].binding-id, or a substrate-binding-id, or an actor-id when an actor is added/removed).

binding-kind.description: Which kind of binding was changed. Useful for filtered-view queries.

record.description: Optional binding-kind-specific record content carrying the full state of the added / removed / updated binding. Per D39 (state-is-fully-derived-from-event-chain): for change-type='add', this slot should carry the full record so workspace state can be reconstructed from the chain alone. Shape is binding-kind-specific (validated against the relevant kind schema by the framework conformance validator, not by this envelope schema — e.g., for binding-kind=actor, record conforms to actor.schema.json).
